features.name: actor
features.safe_summary: Skilled at mimicry and dramatics. Gain +1 CHA. You have Advantage on Deception and Performance checks when trying to pass yourself off as a different person, and you can mimic speech or sounds after hearing them for at least 1 minute.
features.rules_summary: Skilled at mimicry and dramatics. Gain +1 CHA. You have Advantage on Deception and Performance checks when trying to pass yourself off as a different person, and you can mimic speech or sounds after hearing them for at least 1 minute.

features.name: athlete
features.safe_summary: Gain +1 STR or DEX. Standing from prone costs only 5 feet of movement, climbing no longer costs extra movement, and you can make a running long jump or high jump after moving only 5 feet.
features.rules_summary: Gain +1 STR or DEX. Standing from prone costs only 5 feet of movement, climbing no longer costs extra movement, and you can make a running long jump or high jump after moving only 5 feet.

features.name: charger
features.safe_summary: Gain +1 STR or DEX. When you take the Dash action, your movement does not provoke opportunity attacks from the creature you attack this turn, and if you move at least 10 feet straight before a melee hit you can add 1d8 damage or push the target 10 feet.
features.rules_summary: Gain +1 STR or DEX. When you take the Dash action, your movement does not provoke opportunity attacks from the creature you attack this turn, and if you move at least 10 feet straight before a melee hit you can add 1d8 damage or push the target 10 feet.

features.name: chef
features.safe_summary: Gain +1 CON or WIS. You gain proficiency with Cook's Utensils. During a Short Rest you can cook treats equal to your proficiency bonus; a creature can eat one as a Bonus Action to gain temporary HP equal to your proficiency bonus.
features.rules_summary: Gain +1 CON or WIS. You gain proficiency with Cook's Utensils. During a Short Rest you can cook treats equal to your proficiency bonus; a creature can eat one as a Bonus Action to gain temporary HP equal to your proficiency bonus.

features.safe_summary: Crossbow Expert: Gain a +1 ability increase where noted and the feat's listed combat or utility benefits per 2024 PHB rules text.

features.name: alert
features.safe_summary: Always on the lookout for danger. You gain the following benefits: Initiative +5, you can't be Surprised while conscious, other creatures don't gain Advantage on attack rolls against you as a result of being unseen by you.
features.rules_summary: Always on the lookout for danger. You gain the following benefits: Initiative +5, you can't be Surprised while conscious, other creatures don't gain Advantage on attack rolls against you as a result of being unseen by you.

features.name: crafter
features.safe_summary: You gain proficiency with 3 Artisan's Tools. Whenever you make a purchase, you receive a 20% discount. Once per LR you can craft a nonmagical item of 20 GP or less in 1 hour.
features.rules_summary: You gain proficiency with 3 Artisan's Tools. Whenever you make a purchase, you receive a 20% discount. Once per LR you can craft a nonmagical item of 20 GP or less in 1 hour.

features.name: healer
features.safe_summary: You gain proficiency with Healer's Kit. As an Action, spend one use from Kit to restore 1d6+4 + creature's level HP to a creature at 0 HP (stabilizes them at that HP, not 0). Can only use on each creature once per battle.
features.rules_summary: You gain proficiency with Healer's Kit. As an Action, spend one use from Kit to restore 1d6+4 + creature's level HP to a creature at 0 HP (stabilizes them at that HP, not 0). Can only use on each creature once per battle.

features.name: lucky
features.safe_summary: You have 3 Luck Points per Long Rest. Whenever you make an attack roll, ability check, or saving throw, you can spend one Luck Point to roll an additional d20 and choose which d20 to use. You can also spend a Luck Point when an attack is made against you, applying the same choice.
features.rules_summary: You have 3 Luck Points per Long Rest. Whenever you make an attack roll, ability check, or saving throw, you can spend one Luck Point to roll an additional d20 and choose which d20 to use. You can also spend a Luck Point when an attack is made against you, applying the same choice.

features.name: magic-initiate-arcane
features.safe_summary: Choose Bard, Sorcerer, or Wizard. You learn 2 cantrips from that list and one 1st-level spell. Cast the 1st-level spell once per Long Rest (or with spell slots if you have them). INT or WIS or CHA determines your spellcasting ability (choose when you take this feat).
features.rules_summary: Choose Bard, Sorcerer, or Wizard. You learn 2 cantrips from that list and one 1st-level spell. Cast the 1st-level spell once per Long Rest (or with spell slots if you have them). INT or WIS or CHA determines your spellcasting ability (choose when you take this feat).

features.name: magic-initiate-divine
features.safe_summary: Choose Cleric or Paladin. You learn 2 cantrips and one 1st-level spell from that list. Same mechanics as Arcane variant.
features.rules_summary: Choose Cleric or Paladin. You learn 2 cantrips and one 1st-level spell from that list. Same mechanics as Arcane variant.

features.name: magic-initiate-primal
features.safe_summary: Choose Druid or Ranger. You learn 2 cantrips and one 1st-level spell from that list.
features.rules_summary: Choose Druid or Ranger. You learn 2 cantrips and one 1st-level spell from that list.

features.name: savage-attacker
features.safe_summary: You've trained to deal particularly grievous wounds in battle. Once per turn when you hit a target with a weapon, you can roll the weapon's damage dice twice and use either roll.
features.rules_summary: You've trained to deal particularly grievous wounds in battle. Once per turn when you hit a target with a weapon, you can roll the weapon's damage dice twice and use either roll.

features.name: skilled
features.safe_summary: Gain proficiency in any combination of 3 skills or tools of your choice.
features.rules_summary: Gain proficiency in any combination of 3 skills or tools of your choice.

features.name: tavern-brawler
features.safe_summary: Your unarmed strikes deal 1d4 + STR bludgeoning damage. When you hit a creature with an unarmed strike, you can use a Bonus Action to attempt to grapple them. You can use furniture and environment as improvised weapons.
features.rules_summary: Your unarmed strikes deal 1d4 + STR bludgeoning damage. When you hit a creature with an unarmed strike, you can use a Bonus Action to attempt to grapple them. You can use furniture and environment as improvised weapons.

features.name: tough
features.safe_summary: Your HP maximum increases by 2 for each level you've taken (this means +2 at 1st level, and you gain an additional +2 whenever you gain a level). Essentially adds +20 HP by level 10.
features.rules_summary: Your HP maximum increases by 2 for each level you've taken (this means +2 at 1st level, and you gain an additional +2 whenever you gain a level). Essentially adds +20 HP by level 10.
